title: Should We Extend Atlas for Higher Returns or Start a New Project?
recommendation: Atlas-first hybrid: prioritize Atlas trust gates and gated sizing, while running a small zero-capital research-only prediction-market/NRL spike.
key_gates: #219 regression harness ships by Day 3 or new-project spike pauses
#215 overlay log-only review before live approval changes
#387 sizing only after harness validation and drawdown-period backtests
New-project build only if research spike shows clear OOS/market edge
